title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入塞尔维亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入塞爾維亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Serbia CE/EN-oriented product safety and EMC expectations, ISS-adopted TS EN battery standards, AERS storage and grid-connection requirements, fire-safety review, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与塞尔维亚 CE/EN 对齐产品安全与EMC要求、ISS 采用 TS EN 电池标准、AERS 储能及并网要求、消防安全审查及 UN 38.3 运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與塞爾維亞 CE/EN 對齊產品安全與 EMC 要求、ISS 採用 TS EN 電池標準、AERS 儲能及併網要求、消防安全審查及 UN 38.3 運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, CE scope determination, ISS approval, AERS licence decision, EMS grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, designers, and installers should verify current Serbia product-safety, fire authority, EMS, AERS, transport, customs, and local installation requirements with qualified Serbian professionals before shipment, sale, interconnection, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、CE适用范围裁定、ISS批准、AERS许可决定、EMS并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、销售、并网或安装前，应与合格塞尔维亚专业人士核实现行塞尔维亚产品安全、消防主管机关、EMS、AERS、运输、海关及当地安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、CE適用範圍裁定、ISS批准、AERS許可決定、EMS併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、併網或安裝前，應與合格塞爾維亞專業人士核實現行塞爾維亞產品安全、消防主管機關、EMS、AERS、運輸、海關及當地安裝要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Serbia, the practical baseline is CE/EN-oriented product compliance where the equipment falls under low-voltage, EMC, machinery, radio, RoHS, or related product rules; ISS-tracked TS EN IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 evidence is commonly used for battery and system safety; UN 38.3 is needed for lithium-battery transport; and AERS plus EMS grid-operator review is separate for storage projects and interconnection.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口塞尔维亚时，实务基线是：设备落入低电压、EMC、机械、无线电、RoHS或相关产品规则范围的，应满足 CE/EN 对应产品合规；ISS 采用的 TS EN IEC 62619 与 IEC 62933证据通常用于电池和系统安全；锂电运输需要UN 38.3；储能项目和并网还需单独处理AERS及 EMS 电网企业审查。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口塞爾維亞時，實務基線是：設備落入低電壓、EMC、機械、無線電、RoHS或相關產品規則範圍的，應滿足 CE/EN 對應產品合規；ISS 採用的 TS EN IEC 62619 與 IEC 62933 證據通常用於電池和系統安全；鋰電運輸需要UN 38.3；儲能項目和併網還需單獨處理 AERS 及 EMS 電網企業審查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
